subcodes.first_line: O thou who art supplicating unto God! Those souls who have entered beneath the Covenant of the Most Great Luminary of the horizons and laid hold of the sure handle of His Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متضرع الی الله نفوسیکه در تحت میثاق نیر اعظم آفاق داخل و بعروه الوثقای عهد
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @prayer for governments and rulers, @firmness in the Covenant
